title: Leaf from a Book of Hours: The Annunciation (recto)
description: Leaf from a Book of Hours: The Annunciation (recto), 1470s. Flanders, Ghent (?), 15th century. Ink, tempera and gold on vellum; leaf: 17.9 x 12.5 cm (7 1/16 x 4 15/16 in.). The Cleveland Museum of Art, The Jeanne Miles Blackburn Collection, 2014.24.a
